The Problem

Your Business Is Losing Money Every Day

Manual processes are silently killing your growth. Every hour spent on repetitive tasks is revenue walking out the door.

01

Too Many Calls

Your team is buried in inbound calls — missing leads, dropping quality and burning time on queries AI can handle instantly, every time.

↓ 80% of calls never need a human
02

Missed Inquiries

WhatsApp and DM inquiries pile up unanswered. Every hour of silence is a prospect moving on to a competitor who replied in seconds.

↑ 70% of buyers choose whoever replies first
03

No Sales Pipeline

Leads arrive with no system to track, follow up or close them. Without a CRM pipeline, hot deals go cold and revenue leaks silently every day.

↑ 67% of deals lost to poor pipeline hygiene
04

Manual Repetitive Tasks

Your team spends hours on data entry, follow-ups and admin that should never touch a human hand — draining productivity and morale daily.

↑ $4,500+/month lost on manual work
05

Missed Appointment Bookings

No automated booking means prospects forget, no-show or book with a faster competitor. Every missed slot is direct revenue walking out the door.

↓ 40% revenue lost to missed appointments
06

No Analytics or Visibility

Decisions made blind. No live dashboards, no automated reporting — just hours wasted pulling data manually while opportunities slip past unnoticed.

↓ 55% slower decisions without live dashboards
The Solution

AI Agents That Work While You Sleep

AutoForge AI replaces every repetitive task in your business with intelligent automation — permanently eliminating manual bottlenecks.

📞

AI Voice Receptionist

Never miss a call again. AI answers, qualifies and routes every inbound call 24/7 — no human needed.

💬

AI WhatsApp Automation

Every inquiry replied to instantly. AI handles conversations, qualifies leads and books meetings on WhatsApp automatically.

🔄

AI CRM Pipeline Automation

Leads auto-captured, scored and tracked. Your pipeline stays clean and deals never fall through the cracks again.

📈

AI Analytics Dashboard

Live performance visibility across every channel — no manual reporting, no blind decisions, ever again.

Department 01
🎯

Sales & Lead Automation

Automate your entire sales pipeline — from first lead contact to signed deal — without your team lifting a finger.

🎧

Customer & Support Automation

📣

Marketing & Communication

  • AI content creation & distribution
  • Analytics & performance reporting

↑ 40% more discovery calls booked
Department 04
⚙️

Operations & Admin Automation

Eliminate every manual internal process — data entry, reporting, HR, finance and workflow management — all automated end-to-end.

  • Zero manual data entry & CRM updates
  • AI reporting dashboards & BI
  • HR & employee onboarding automation
  • Finance & payment processing automation
  • Document & knowledge management
  • Project & task management automation
  • AI workflow agents & SOP automation
↓ 5hrs/day saved per employee

About the Founder

Hi, I'm Dhanush S

n8n Certified Expert Partner · AI Automation Developer · Founder, AutoForge AI

I help businesses deploy custom AI agents that automate lead generation, customer support, CRM management, and operations — so founders and their teams can focus on growth, not repetitive tasks.

As an n8n Certified Expert Partner — one of only a few hundred worldwide — I bring verified expertise in building production-grade automation systems. With deep knowledge of OpenAI, Claude, WhatsApp API and the full modern stack, I've delivered measurable ROI for international clients.

FAQ

Everything You Need to Know

Most projects go live in 2–4 weeks. Simple single automations can be live in 7 days. Complex multi-system builds take 4–6 weeks. I give you a precise timeline before we start and honour it.

Zero. I handle everything — architecture, build, integration, testing and launch. You only need clarity on your business challenges. All technology is handled end-to-end.

Pricing is based on the complexity and requirements of your project. Every automation system is custom-scoped. Book a free strategy call and I'll give you an exact quote based on your specific needs.

17+ production-tested tools — n8n, OpenAI, Claude, WhatsApp API, HubSpot, Shopify, Airtable, Stripe, Supabase, Vapi, Telegram, Gmail, Google Workspace, Perplexity, Zoho and more.

No. AI handles repetitive, rules-based tasks — freeing your team to focus on higher-value work. My clients consistently report happier, more productive teams after implementation.

Book a free 30-minute strategy call. I'll audit your workflows, identify your top automation opportunities, and give you a custom roadmap — zero commitment required. Or email directly at dhanush@theautoforgeai.com
